_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremA_semiseparable.py (A3 + A4). Mirrors the A3A4Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §8.3 (A3 primary) + §8.4 (A4 secondary). A3 = explicit theorem-consistent semiseparable / SSD realization vs reduced (A_S, B_S) at machine precision; A4 = negative controls (circular conv + non-GD mask) showing reduced-Γ behavior is not universal.
